product_overview: Portal admin ini memungkinkan administrator mengelola konten dan data operasional UII Dalwa Press dari satu dashboard terpusat. Pengguna dapat login, memantau dashboard, serta mengelola news, kategori buku, author, buku, submission, royalti, user, role, profile, dan pengaturan.
core_goals: Masuk ke portal admin dan mengakses dashboard administrasi
Mengelola news, kategori buku, author, dan buku
Meninjau serta memperbarui submission termasuk assignment editor dan review
Mengelola user, role, profile, dan pengaturan admin

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Admin dapat masuk ke portal menggunakan kredensial akun testing yang valid atau melihat validasi saat kredensial salah.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in username/email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See admin dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in username/email -> Fill in password with incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See login error message
Submit logout action -> See redirected to /login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin dapat membuka dashboard sebagai pusat ringkasan dan navigasi untuk area administrasi.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/dashboard -> See admin dashboard layout and main content

features.name: News Management
features.description: Admin dapat melihat daftar news, membuat news baru, mengubah news, dan menghapus news.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/news -> Scroll through news list -> Search by title or body -> Filter by category or status -> See updated results
Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Fill in news title -> Select news category -> Fill in body content -> Set status to Draft -> Submit form -> See success feedback and news in list

Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Fill in news title -> Select news category -> Fill in body content -> Upload valid image -> Upload valid video -> Set status to Published -> Submit form -> See published news in list
Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Submit form without title -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Submit form without category -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Upload invalid image file -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/news/create -> Upload unsupported video format -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/news -> Open an existing news item for editing -> Change title, body, or status -> Save changes -> See updated news data
Navigate to /administrator/news -> Delete an existing news item -> Confirm deletion -> See news removed from list

features.name: Book Category Management
features.description: Admin dapat mengelola kategori buku melalui create, search, update, dan delete.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/book-categories -> Create a category with a unique name -> Search for the category -> Edit the category name or description -> Delete the category
Navigate to /administrator/book-categories -> Select a category already used by a book or submission -> Delete the category -> See deletion blocked with validation message

features.name: Author Management
features.description: Admin dapat membuat, mencari, memperbarui, dan menghapus author beserta foto dan data pendukung.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/authors -> Create a new author with a unique name -> Fill in optional contact and profile details -> Upload a valid photo -> Save author -> Search for the author -> Edit author data or replace/remove photo -> Delete the author
Navigate to /administrator/authors -> Select an author that already has books -> Delete the author -> See deletion blocked with validation message

features.name: Book Management
features.description: Admin dapat melihat daftar buku, membuat draft atau published book, memperbarui metadata dan file, serta menghapus buku.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/books -> Search by title, ISBN, description, or author -> Filter by category, author, status, or featured status -> See filtered results
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Select category -> Select author -> Fill in title -> Set status to Draft -> Submit form -> See book added to list

Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Select category -> Select author -> Fill in title and metadata -> Set status to Published -> Upload cover image -> Upload preview PDF -> Upload full PDF -> Upload gallery images -> Submit form -> See published book in list
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Submit form without category -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Submit form without author -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Submit form without title -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Enter year outside the allowed range -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Enter pages below minimum -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books/create -> Upload unsupported preview file format -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/books -> Open a book for editing -> Change title, status, or metadata -> Replace cover image or remove attached files -> Save changes -> See updated book details
Navigate to /administrator/books -> Delete an existing book -> Confirm deletion -> See book removed from list

features.name: Submission Management
features.description: Admin dapat meninjau daftar submission, membuka detail submission, memperbarui metadata dan status, menugaskan editor, memberi review manual, serta menghapus submission.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Search by title, author name, or email -> Filter by category or status -> See matching submissions in the list
Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Open a submission from the list -> See submission detail including reviews, editor assignments, and related files

Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Open a submission detail -> Update title, author name, email, phone, description, or note -> Change status to Accepted -> Save changes -> See updated submission data

Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Open a submitted submission detail -> Choose a primary editor -> Choose one or more co-editors -> Add assignment note -> Save assignment -> See submission change to under review

Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Open a submission detail -> Add a manual review with revision status -> Fill in reviewer name, reviewer email, and note -> Submit review -> See review added and status updated
Navigate to /administrator/submissions -> Delete an existing submission -> Confirm deletion -> See submission removed from list

features.name: Royalty Management
features.description: Admin dapat melihat ringkasan royalti, membuat royalti untuk buku published, memperbarui data royalti, dan menghapus royalti draft.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/royalties -> Search by title, ISBN, or author -> Filter by book, author, status, month, or year -> See updated list and summary

Navigate to /administrator/royalties/create -> Select a published book -> Fill in period month and year -> Fill in sold quantity, sale price per unit, and royalty per unit -> Set status to Draft -> Submit form -> See royalty created with calculated amounts
Navigate to /administrator/royalties/create -> Select a published book -> Fill in required fields -> Set status to Paid -> Leave paid date empty -> Submit form -> See paid date filled automatically
Navigate to /administrator/royalties/create -> Select a non-published book -> Submit form -> See validation error message
Navigate to /administrator/royalties -> Delete a draft royalty -> Confirm deletion -> See royalty removed from list

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin dapat membuat, mencari, memperbarui, dan menghapus user dengan role dan status tertentu.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/manajemen-user -> Create a new user with unique username and email -> Select a role -> Set status to Active -> Save user -> Search and filter the user -> Edit user details, role, or status -> Update password -> Delete the test user
Navigate to /administrator/manajemen-user -> Select the currently logged-in admin account -> Delete the account -> See deletion blocked with validation message
Navigate to /administrator/manajemen-user -> Create a user with duplicate username or email, missing role, or too-short password -> Submit form -> See validation error message

features.name: Role Management
features.description: Admin dapat membuat, mencari, memperbarui, memfilter, dan menghapus role yang tidak sedang dipakai user.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/manajemen-role -> Create a new role with a unique name -> Search the role -> Filter by status -> Edit description or status -> Delete the role
Navigate to /administrator/manajemen-role -> Select a role that already has users -> Delete the role -> See deletion blocked with validation message

features.name: Admin Profile
features.description: Admin dapat membuka halaman profile untuk melihat data akun dan, bila tersedia, memperbaruinya.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/profile -> See admin profile information
Navigate to /administrator/profile -> Update valid profile fields -> Save changes -> See updated profile data

features.name: Settings
features.description: Admin dapat membuka halaman pengaturan untuk smoke test dan memastikan layout admin tetap konsisten.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrator/pengaturan -> See settings page and admin layout

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Browse Books
features.description: View list of published books and their details
user_interactions: Click a book to view detail
